# 间隔重复

间隔重复 is a core concept in cognitive science and psychology. Closely related to [[anki]], [[neuroplasticity]], [[make-it-stick]], [[feynman-technique]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
